events.event_description: Establishment of nonresident ambassadorial relations with Vanuatu. First U.S. Ambassador Everett E. Bierman presented credentials in Port Moresby (Papua New Guinea), confirming a nonresident posting.

evidence.quote: Everett E Bierman, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1987-03-13. Credentials presented: 1987-04-10. Left Port Moresby 1989-10-30.
